items.prompt: A happy family with young children walking through the entrance of a modern international school in Dubai, bright cheerful building, children in school uniforms, warm morning sunlight, welcoming positive atmosphere, editorial lifestyle photography. No text in image. Wide 16:9 format.

Parents visiting a Dubai school during actual school day not open day, observing real classroom environment, teacher interactions, authentic school culture assessment mood, editorial documentary photography. No text in image. Wide 16:9 format.
